item.title: WW2 Fighter Airplane: Will It Start?
item.description: An attempt to bring a World War II fighter plane back to life, testing whether its engine will run again.

media:content.media:title: WW2 Fighter Airplane: Will It Start?
media:content.media:description: An attempt to bring a World War II fighter plane back to life, testing whether its engine will run again.

item.title: Life in a Van
item.description: A look at the ups and downs of living full-time in a van, balancing freedom with daily challenges.

media:content.media:title: Life in a Van

item.title: Intrusive Thoughts Winning
item.description: Unexpected ideas surface in the hangar. What surprising thoughts come to light in Jimmy’s World?

item.title: Airplane Deal of the Week: Biplane
item.description: A vintage biplane hits the spotlight. What makes this week’s airplane deal such a rare find?

item.title: A 68-Year-Old Plane Gets a New Chance
item.description: Decades of silence end as a vintage aircraft prepares to fly again. Can this 68‑year‑old plane truly take to the skies once more?

media:content.media:title: A 68-Year-Old Plane Gets a New Chance
media:content.media:description: Decades of silence end as a vintage aircraft prepares to fly again. Can this 68‑year‑old plane truly take to the skies once more?

item.title: An Abandoned Airplane Gets a New Look
item.description: Years of neglect fade away as restoration begins. How does this abandoned airplane transform with its new look?

media:content.media:title: An Abandoned Airplane Gets a New Look
media:content.media:description: Years of neglect fade away as restoration begins. How does this abandoned airplane transform with its new look?

item.title: Starting Up the Russian MiG‑23
item.description: A Cold War fighter roars back to life. What happens when the MiG‑23’s engines fire up again?

media:content.media:title: Starting Up the Russian MiG‑23
media:content.media:description: A Cold War fighter roars back to life. What happens when the MiG‑23’s engines fire up again?
